hooks.name: planning-baseline-advisory
hooks.description: Advisory: not behind upstream before significant planning (management hub policy).

hooks.name: skill-usage-prompt
hooks.description: AIS CR skill usage (required): log aiscr-* slugs from the user prompt to gitignored repo .venv/aiscr-skill-usage/raw/ (skill_usage_paths.py; local bootstrap may create .venv).

hooks.name: mgmt-stop-advisory
hooks.description: Advisory: usage log, sync-layer2, README CZ/EN parity reminders.

hooks.name: shell-guard-advisory
hooks.description: Advisory: high-impact script and venv guards for shell commands.

hooks.name: skill-usage-read-file
hooks.description: AIS CR skill usage (required): log when read_file targets a workflow SKILL.md path.
